description: Crisis event catalog for BEE counterfactual replay (LLM_FORBIDDEN)

events.name: UST/Luna Depeg
events.expected_gate_reaction: EXIT from UST-exposed positions, rotate to USDC/DAI
events.notes: Total algorithmic stablecoin collapse. UST depegged to near 0.

events.name: stETH Discount
events.expected_gate_reaction: EXIT stETH positions, monitor liquidity depth
events.notes: stETH traded at discount to ETH due to liquidity drain post-Terra.

events.name: FTX Collapse / Contagion
events.expected_gate_reaction: DEFENSIVE mode, reduce exposure, monitor systemic risk flags
events.notes: FTX collapse caused contagion across DeFi. Vol spike, TVL drain.

events.name: USDC Depeg (SVB bank run)
events.expected_gate_reaction: kill_switch or EXIT USDC positions within 4-8 hours of depeg crossing 0.5%
events.notes: USDC depegged to ~$0.87 due to SVB insolvency exposing Circle reserves.

events.name: USDe/Delta-Neutral Funding Stress
events.expected_gate_reaction: EXIT if funding_rate < threshold, rotate from sUSDe to safer assets
events.notes: Funding rate flip stress test for delta-neutral stablecoin wrappers.
